benefit: Central Government guaranteed minimum pension of Rs. 1000, Rs. 2000, Rs. 3000, Rs. 4000, or Rs. 5000 per month after the age of 60 years until death.
Spouse of the subscriber receives the same pension amount until their death after the subscriber's demise.
Nominee of the subscriber receives the accumulated pension wealth after the demise of both the subscriber and spouse.
If subscriber dies before 60 years, spouse has the option to continue contributing for the remaining vesting period to receive the pension.
Central Government funds any inadequacy if accumulated corpus earns a lower-than-estimated return to ensure minimum guaranteed pension.
Subscribers receive enhanced pensionary benefits if investment returns are higher.
eligibility: Must have a savings bank account.
Minimum age of joining is 18 years.
Maximum age of joining is 40 years.
Not an income-tax payer (or has not been an income-tax payer) from 1st October, 2022.
